citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 1:45 PM on 2/17/26.
The inspector arrived at 1:45 PM on 2/17/26 to conduct an inspection and tried to contact the Licensee via phone and text
message, rang the doorbell, and knocked on the front door. Inspector then waited 30 minutes before leaving the
premises. The Licensee contacted the inspector later that day by text message that they were at a distant of-site location
and would not return until the end of the week.
Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations.
Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b)  Repeat
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 1:45 PM on 2/17/26.  
 
The inspector arrived at 1:45 PM on 2/17/26 to conduct an inspection and tried to contact the Licensee via phone and text 
message, rang the doorbell, and knocked on the front door. Inspector then waited 30 minutes before leaving the 
premises. The Licensee contacted the inspector later that day by text message that they were at a distant of-site location 
and would not return until the end of the week. 
 
Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. 
Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
